title: PMS ELF 10 Colours Ball Pen
features: 10 Vibrant Colors: The set includes a variety of bright and colorful inks to suit any mood or style.
Elf Designs: Each pen features a cute and festive elf design on the barrel.
Smooth Writing: The ballpoint tip provides a smooth and consistent writing experience.
Comfortable Grip: The ergonomic grip ensures comfortable writing for extended periods.
Perfect for Gifting: This pen set makes a great gift for kids, adults, or anyone who loves elves and writing.
